parts.text:
Now I understand the issue. The compilation errors are in the `NisAppConfig.java` file, specifically in the `flyway()` method (lines 103-115). The issue is that the newer version of Flyway uses a builder pattern (`Flyway.configure()`) instead of the no-arg constructor with setter methods.

The current code:
```java
final org.flywaydb.core.Flyway flyway = new Flyway();
flyway.setDataSource(this.dataSource());
flyway.setClassLoader(NisAppConfig.class.getClassLoader());
flyway.setLocations(prop.getProperty("flyway.locations"));
flyway.setValidateOnMigrate(Boolean.valueOf(prop.getProperty("flyway.validate")));
return flyway;
```

Should be changed to use the builder pattern:
```java
final org.flywaydb.core.Flyway flyway = Flyway.configure()
    .dataSource(this.dataSource())
    .classLoader(NisAppConfig.class.getClassLoader())
    .locations(prop.getProperty("flyway.locations"))
    .validateOnMigrate(Boolean.valueOf(prop.getProperty("flyway.validate")))
    .load();
return flyway;
```

51:                             ObjectCreationExpr creation = (ObjectCreationExpr) initializer;
52:                             
53:                             if (creation.getType().asString().equals("org.flywaydb.core.Flyway") ||
54:                                 creation.getType().asString().equals("Flyway")) {
55:                                 
56:                                 String varName = variable.getNameAsString();
57:                                 
58:                                 List<Expression> setterCalls = new ArrayList<>();
59:                                 List<Integer> setterIndices = new ArrayList<>();
60:                                 
61:                                 for (int j = i + 1; j < statements.size(); j++) {

73:                                                 setterCalls.add(methodCall);

75:                                             }
76:                                         }
77:                                     }
78:                                 }

86:                                     MethodCallExpr finalCall = configureCall;

91:                                         String builderMethodName = methodName;

<type>file</type>
<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.NodeList;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.body.MethodDeclaration;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.*;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.*;
9: 
10: import java.io.File;
11: import java.io.IOException;
12: import java.nio.file.Files;
13: import java.nio.file.Paths;
14: import java.util.ArrayList;
15: import java.util.List;
16: 
17: public class Main {
18:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
19:         if (args.length < 1) {
20:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <path-to-java-file>");
21:             System.exit(1);
22:         }
23: 
24:         String filePath = args[0];
25:         File file = new File(filePath);
26:         
27:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
28:         
29:         cu.findAll(MethodDeclaration.class).stream()
30:             .filter(method -> method.getNameAsString().equals("flyway"))
31:             .forEach(Main::transformFlywayMethod);
32:         
33:         Files.write(Paths.get(filePath), cu.toString().getBytes());
34:         System.out.println("Transformation complete: " + filePath);
35:     }
36: 
37:     private static void transformFlywayMethod(MethodDeclaration method) {
38:         method.getBody().ifPresent(body -> {
39:             NodeList<Statement> statements = body.getStatements();
40:             
41:             for (int i = 0; i < statements.size(); i++) {
42:                 Statement stmt = statements.get(i);
43:                 
44:                 if (!(stmt instanceof LocalClassDeclarationStmt)) {
45:                     continue;
46:                 }
47:             }
48:             
49:             List<Integer> toRemove = new ArrayList<>();
50:             
51:             for (int i = 0; i < statements.size(); i++) {
52:                 Statement stmt = statements.get(i);
53:                 
54:                 if (stmt instanceof ExpressionStmt) {
55:                     ExpressionStmt exprStmt = (ExpressionStmt) stmt;
56:                     Expression expr = exprStmt.getExpression();
57:                     
58:                     if (expr instanceof VariableDeclarationExpr) {
59:                         VariableDeclarationExpr varDecl = (VariableDeclarationExpr) expr;
60:                         
61:                         if (varDecl.getVariables().size() == 1) {
62:                             var variable = varDecl.getVariables().get(0);
63:                             Expression initializer = variable.getInitializer().orElse(null);
64:                             
65:                             if (initializer instanceof ObjectCreationExpr) {
66:                                 ObjectCreationExpr creation = (ObjectCreationExpr) initializer;
67:                                 
68:                                 if (creation.getType().asString().equals("org.flywaydb.core.Flyway") ||
69:                                     creation.getType().asString().equals("Flyway")) {
70:                                     
71:                                     String varName = variable.getNameAsString();
72:                                     
73:                                     List<MethodCallExpr> setterCalls = new ArrayList<>();
74:                                     List<Integer> setterIndices = new ArrayList<>();
75:                                     
76:                                     for (int j = i + 1; j < statements.size(); j++) {
77:                                         Statement nextStmt = statements.get(j);
78:                                         if (nextStmt instanceof ExpressionStmt) {
79:                                             ExpressionStmt nextExprStmt = (ExpressionStmt) nextStmt;
80:                                             Expression nextExpr = nextExprStmt.getExpression();
81:                                             
82:                                             if (nextExpr instanceof MethodCallExpr) {
83:                                                 MethodCallExpr methodCall = (MethodCallExpr) nextExpr;
84:                                                 Expression scope = methodCall.getScope().orElse(null);
85:                                                 
86:                                                 if (scope instanceof NameExpr &&
87:                                                     ((NameExpr) scope).getNameAsString().equals(varName)) {
88:                                                     setterCalls.add(methodCall);
89:                                                     setterIndices.add(j);
90:                                                 }
91:                                             }
92:                                         }
93:                                     }
94:                                     
95:                                     if (!setterCalls.isEmpty()) {
96:                                         MethodCallExpr configureCall = new MethodCallExpr(
97:                                             new NameExpr("Flyway"),
98:                                             "configure"
99:                                         );
100:

parts.text:
Project **@nem/** now compiles successfully.

**Summary:**

1. **Compilation errors identified** in `/workspace/nem/nis/src/main/java/org/nem/specific/deploy/appconfig/NisAppConfig.java`:
   - Flyway 9.x API change: no-arg constructor removed, setter methods replaced with builder pattern
   - `classLoader()` method removed in Flyway 9.x

2. **JavaParser transformation created** at `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java`:
   - Parses Java files and finds `flyway()` method
   - Transforms setter-based Flyway initialization to builder pattern
   - Skips `setClassLoader()` calls (removed in Flyway 9.x)

3. **Fix applied** to `NisAppConfig.java:96`:
   - Before: `new Flyway()` with setter calls including `setClassLoader()`
   - After: `Flyway.configure().dataSource(...).locations(...).validateOnMigrate(...).load()`

4. **Build verified**: `mvn compile` now succeeds for all 5 modules
